chat_messages.text: What's the right structure for a personal AI second brain?
Two vaults: one MCP-wired, one air-gapped. Hard filesystem separation.
What about psychometrics? Should they live in the same vault?
Inferred psychometrics live in the brain vault under _meta/. Raw input that fed the inference stays in private/.
Which Obsidian MCP server is most mature?
MarkusPfundstein/mcp-obsidian is the community standard. cyanheads/obsidian-mcp-server is more production-grade with HTTP transport.
